name: Marinated Antipasto
recipeIngredient: 8 oz bottle Seven Seas Viva Italian dressing
1 can (14 oz) artichoke hearts, drained, cut into quarters
1 package (8 oz) monterey jack cheese, cut into sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour dressing over artichoke hearts, pepperoni, tomatoes, olives, and peppers.
2. Cover and marinate in the refrigerator overnight.
3. Drain the mixture.
4. Arrange pepperoni, vegetables, and cheese on a lettuce-covered platter.
